## Summary

Describe the proposed feature.

## Why It Belongs In ReDD

Explain whether this should be:

- public API
- internal runtime component
- experiment-only support code

## Migration Notes

If this is coming from `ReDD_Dev`, describe the expected config surface, fallback path,
and validation plan.
